Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Rafael Garcia Sanchez For Willful Failure To Comply With This Court S Order Requiring Him To Provide Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jan-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
James O'Brien, Esq. 415-513-7942 for Plaintiff.
Rafael Garcia Sanchez 415-756-3295 Defendant in Pro Per. (In-person)
Victor Arana (son-in-law of Defendant) 415-716-2596 assists Defendant in Spanish (In-person)
9:51am
Rosario Del Pilar Espinosa court certified Spanish interpreter assists Mr. Sanchez.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

The Interpreters office is unable to provide a Spanish interpreter at the beginning of the matter. Mr. Arana states he has accompanied Mr. Sanchez in past hearings and has permission to interpret English to Spanish and Spanish to English. The Court instructs Mr. Arana re: interpretation. The clerk administers the oath to Mr. Victor Arana. Ms. Rosario Espinosa certified Spanish court interpreter takes over interpretation at 9:51am.

ARGUED. Mr. O'Brien argues; Court and Counsel discuss October order. The Court inquires re compliance with court order. Mr. Sanchez responds. The Court admonishes Mr. Sanchez. The Court orders parties to meet and confer via telephone.

10:10 The Court takes a 15-minute recess.
10:27 After meet and confer. Court is back in session. Mr. O'Brien apprises the court parties to meet on Tuesday re discovery responses.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiffs Gladys Perez, Yuridia Perez and Helen Perez's unopposed Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Rafael Garcia Sanchez For Willful Failure To Comply With This Court's Order Requiring Him To Provide Discovery Responses.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
